ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "light_trap_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each light trap collection */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species captured */,
  "total_catch" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals captured in the light trap */,
  "percentage_community" REAL /* Percentage of this species in the light trap community */,
  "lower_ci" REAL /* Lower confidence limit of the percentage */,
  "upper_ci" REAL /* Upper confidence limit of the percentage */,
  "collection_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection event */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day the collection was made */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during collection */,
  "trap_type" TEXT /* Type of light trap used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_light_trap_collections_collection_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_event_id") REFERENCES collection_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_light_trap_collections_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resting_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resting collection */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species captured */,
  "total_catch" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals captured in the resting collection */,
  "percentage_community" REAL /* Percentage of this species in the resting community */,
  "lower_ci" REAL /* Lower confidence limit of the percentage */,
  "upper_ci" REAL /* Upper confidence limit of the percentage */,
  "collection_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection event */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day the collection was made */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during collection */,
  "resting_site_type" TEXT /* Type of resting site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resting_collections_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resting_collections_collection_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_event_id") REFERENCES collection_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., field technician, biologist) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat at the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection event */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the collection occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the collection was made */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who conducted the collection */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for collection (e.g., light trap, resting collection) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the collection event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_events_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
